models.k_image_model¶

K_image_model.py

This file defines joint k-space and image-domain segmentation models. It includes gating and attention mechanisms to fuse k-space features with image features, enabling multi-modal learning for improved segmentation performance.

For both fully sampling and undersampling

Classes

GateFuse(*args, **kwargs)

Gated fusion module for combining coarse and image features.

KImgSegModel2([k_in_ch, num_classes, nf, ...])

Multi-modal segmentation model combining k-space and image features.
class models.k_image_model.GateFuse(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Gated fusion module for combining coarse and image features.

This module learns a pixel-wise gating map to adaptively fuse two input feature maps.

Parameters:

  • args (Any) –

  • kwargs (Any) –

Return type:

Any

forward(coarse, img)[source]¶
class models.k_image_model.KImgSegModel2(k_in_ch=2, num_classes=4, nf=64, unet_base=24, use_in=True, drop_img_p=0.0)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Multi-modal segmentation model combining k-space and image features.

This model encodes k-space data with a recurrent encoder, generates a coarse reconstruction, and fuses it with image features using channel-wise gating and pixel attention. A U-Net refines the fused representation to produce segmentation outputs.

Parameters:

  • k_in_ch (int, default=2) – Number of k-space input channels (e.g., real + imaginary).

  • num_classes (int, default=4) – Number of segmentation classes.

  • nf (int, default=64) – Feature dimension for the k-space encoder.

  • unet_base (int, default=24) – Base number of feature channels for the U-Net.

  • use_in (bool, default=True) – Whether to use Instance Normalization in the U-Net.

  • drop_img_p (float, default=0.0) – Probability of dropping the image channel during training to encourage reliance on k-space features.

  • args (Any) –

  • kwargs (Any) –

Return type:

Any

enc¶

K-space recurrent encoder.

Type:

nn.Module

coarse¶

Coarse reconstruction head producing [B,1,H,W].

Type:

nn.Module

se_gate¶

Squeeze-and-excitation gate for channel-wise modulation.

Type:

nn.Module

pix_att¶

Pixel-level attention mechanism.

Type:

nn.Module

refiner¶

U-Net segmentation head refining fused inputs.

Type:

nn.Module

Loss function
----------
loss(logits

Compute segmentation losses. Returns a dictionary with: - “ce”: Cross-entropy loss. - “dice”: Dice loss. - “total”: Sum of cross-entropy and Dice losses.

Type:

torch.Tensor, target: torch.Tensor, *_) -> dict

forward(x)[source]¶
loss(logits, target, *_)[source]¶
